game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **迷失岛2：时间的灰烬 (Lost Island 2: The Ashes of Time):** This is a point-and-click puzzle adventure where players explore static 2D hand-drawn scenes by tapping on interactive hotspots to inspect objects, collect items, or initiate dialogue with NPCs. The core mechanic involves solving diverse puzzles, ranging from inventory-based challenges requiring the combination of 2-3 items to logic puzzles like deciphering 4-digit codes or manipulating multi-stage mechanisms. Players manage an inventory of up to 8 items, tapping to select an item then tapping on a scene element to use it, with successful interactions revealing new clues or unlocking access to new interconnected locations. Progression is non-linear, allowing players to explore multiple areas simultaneously, and difficulty scales as puzzles become more intricate, often requiring clues from disparate locations. Upon completing the main narrative, a "New Game+" mode unlocks, introducing additional puzzles, altered clues, and expanded lore to uncover the island's full history.
game_info.description: Explore the mysterious Lost Island through interconnected hand-drawn scenes. Investigate hotspots, collect items, and solve intricate puzzles to uncover the island's secrets. Combine items from your inventory, decipher codes, and manipulate mechanisms to progress. Navigate between locations using discovered pathways and use your collected items strategically to unlock new areas and complete the narrative.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between hotspots and UI elements
Space: Interact with selected hotspot or use selected inventory item
Shift: Cycle through inventory items
Z: Examine selected item or read clues
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to title screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction testing. This validates that the player can navigate between hotspots, interact with objects, collect items, and move between rooms without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Randomly explore hotspots in each scene, interact with objects, collect available items, and transition between rooms. Test inventory management by selecting different items and attempting to use them on various hotspots.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully navigates the game world, collects items, and interacts with hotspots without crashes. The game state updates correctly for all interactions, and transitions between rooms work smoothly.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition testing. This implements an optimal strategy to solve all puzzles and reach the game's completion by following the correct sequence of actions.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Follow a predefined solution path: collect key items in the correct order, solve puzzles using the right item combinations, decipher codes based on clues, and unlock all areas systematically until reaching the final objective.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state by successfully completing all required puzzles and objectives. All critical game mechanics work correctly, and the win condition triggers properly.

TEST_3.test_description: Inventory and item combination testing. This validates that the inventory system works correctly, items can be selected and combined, and item usage produces expected results.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Systematically collect all available items, cycle through inventory, attempt to combine different items, and use items on various hotspots to test all interaction possibilities.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Inventory management works flawlessly with proper item selection, combination logic executes correctly, and using items on appropriate hotspots produces the intended gameplay effects.
